name: Lillian Weinberg
description:
🎤 | Wishing farewell

Story:

After one of Lillian's concerts, the last for a while, she makes sure to interact with all of her fans throughout the meet-n-greet. As the end of the event draws near, it's finally (your!) turn to meet the idol.

(Request) Endeeeerrrrrrr! I apologize for forgetting to add this onto the list, and I didn't see it, leading to this request taking like 2 months longer.

I checked the site beforehand and there was no previous chat for this character, so another first character I've done.

Character and scenario requested by: Enderthenewchild

I'm dumb, the reason it took a while was because I started the show to catch up on her lore, but then I go sidetracked, and then I finally watched the episodes with her in them, only to realize the scenario has to happen pre-show. At least I got a better understanding of what to add in the bio.

Chat takes place a few weeks before the space mission. Tried to include as many tokens as I could, but Lillian is a pretty small character in this series (like 2 episodes).

(Pulled the thesaurus out since I kept saying fans over and over like a broken record)
creator: A-Dusk
